title: Work with Us
description: Innovators across disciplines and settings are key to our success. See if you have what it takes to work with DARPA.
text:
We bring together scientists, engineers, and tinkerers across the innovation ecosystem to push the bounds of technological possibility.
The work we do is challenging by nature, but working with DARPA doesnât have to be. Explore our communities to determine what best aligns with your DARPA journey.
Whether youâre a newcomer or a long-time collaborator, we encourage you to start with DARPAConnect. This comprehensive, free resource is designed to step you through the three main precepts of DARPAConnect:
Discover
Collaborate
Contribute
Whether youâre a new potential DARPA performer or a well-seasoned alum, within each category you'll find a wealth of self-paced modules and reference materials to make sure you're in the best position to engage with DARPA.
Explore Open Opportunities
Get Help with your Proposal
Once you find an opportunity that interests you, the next step is to submit a proposal. Federal contracting guidelines can be daunting. Because we want the best ideas, DARPA has multiple entry points for interested proposers, such as:
DARPAConnect hosts events and provides training and resources for every phase of your DARPA journey
Our Small Business Programs Office has resources and manages opportunities specifically for small business concerns.
The Contract Management Office (CMO) team provides helpful instructions for proposers, including general terms and conditions, grants and agreements, procurement contracts, and other transactions.
After a review process, DARPA selects the winning proposal, notifies applicants, and awards a contract. CMO works closely with awardees throughout the contract signing process.
Communities
Our program managers work closely with partners and stakeholders of all kinds. See which of our communities matches your needs:
